channel.title: Khao Lak Land Discovery Tours
channel.description: High-quality tours in Khao Lak, Thailand

item.title: Phang Nga Bay Sunset Serenity Cruise
item.description: Enjoy a premium, laid-back phang nga bay sunset tour on the Aurora Sea Catamaran, also known as a phan nga bay sunset cruise in some listings. Discover Phang Nga Bay’s remarkable limestone cliffs, clear waters, and hidden lagoons, all while avoiding the crowds. Phang Nga Bay Sunset Serenity Cruise Tour Highlights include Koh Nok, water activities on Koh Kudu, a visit to Ao Kean’s ancient tree, and guided canoeing through Koh Hong’s lagoons. Relish a BBQ dinner at sunset and watch bioluminescent plankton near Koh Panak, before a starry cruise back to Royal Phuket Marina. Transport from your hotel is […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phang Nga Bay, Thailand

item.title: Khao Sok National Park 3 Days Discovery Tour
item.description: If you’re looking for new experiences, breathtaking nature, and a touch of adventure, Khao Sok National Park is the perfect destination. This three-day Khao Sok National Park tour takes you deep into the heart of Southern Thailand’s most stunning rainforest — one of the oldest in the world. Experience a mix of jungle exploration, wildlife encounters, and peaceful moments surrounded by limestone cliffs and emerald waters. Stay overnight in two unique Khao Sok accommodations: a cozy treehouse and a charming floating bungalow on Cheow Lan Lake. It’s the ideal way to disconnect from the outside world and immerse yourself in […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Cheow Lan Lake, Khao Phang, Ban Ta Khun District, Surat Thani, Thailand

item.title: Cheow Lan Lake Adventure | Stay in Khao Sok Floating Bungalows
item.description: Step into the heart of Cheow Lan Lake, the jewel of Khao Sok National Park. With its emerald waters, towering limestone cliffs, and hidden caves, this lake feels like another world. On this 2-day adventure, you’ll cruise by longtail boat, trek to the famous Pakarang (Coral) Cave, and spend the night in authentic Khao Sok floating bungalows right on the water. It’s the perfect mix of jungle adventure and lakeside relaxation. Cheow Lan Lake Tour Highlights Longtail boat journey across Cheow Lan Lake Overnight in cozy Khao Sok floating bungalows Easy jungle walk and bamboo raft to Pakarang (Coral) Cave […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Cheow Lan Lake, Khao Phang, Ban Ta Khun District, Surat Thani, Thailand

item.title: Krabi 4 Island Early Bird Tour – Island Hopping Tour to 4 Breathtaking Krabi Islands!
item.description: Krabi Islands Early Bird Tour – Island Hopping Tour to 4 Breathtaking Krabi Islands! Get ready for an unforgettable adventure with the Krabi 4 Island Tour! This fantastic trip takes you to some of the most picturesque spots in the region, including the serene beauty of Koh Hong Island, where you can explore its enchanting lagoons and pristine beaches. Next up is Poda Island, perfect for soaking up the sun and enjoying crystal-clear waters ideal for snorkelling. Don’t miss the opportunity to discover the hidden gems of Lao Lading Island, where you can unwind in a tropical paradise surrounded by […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Krabi 4 Island Adventure, Ao Nang, Mueang Krabi District, Krabi, Thailand

item.title: Phuket Sunday Walking Street – Explore Phuket’s Fantastic and Unique Shopping Scene!
item.description: Phuket Sunday Walking Street and Central Festival Khao Lak is renowned for its serene beaches and stunning natural beauty, offering the perfect setting for relaxation. However, if you’re looking for a shopping extravaganza, Khao Lak might not be the ideal place. That’s where Khao Lak Land Discovery comes in! We’ve curated a day-trip itinerary to take you to Phuket, a shopaholic’s paradise! If shopping brings you joy, then Sundays in Phuket are a dream come true! Join us for an unforgettable day of exploring Phuket’s vibrant shopping scene at the Sunday night market walking street. En route to the Lard […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phuket Old Town, Mueang Phuket District, Phuket, Thailand

item.title: Khao Sok Jungle Trek – discover the magic of the rainforest
item.description: Khao Sok Jungle Trek Get ready for an incredible adventure! If you are a first-time trekker or an experienced adventurer looking for an excursion that will take you deep into the heart of Khao Sok National Park, look no further. Khao Lak Land Discovery has the perfect tour for you! Khao Sok National Park is undeniably the premier wildlife safari destination in Thailand, and understandably so. Khao Sok is the crown jewel of Thai National Parks and one of the oldest rainforest habitats in the world. This pristine rainforest ecosystem is home to an astonishing array of wildlife, including playful […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Sok National Park, Khlong Sok, Surat Thani

item.title: Takua Pa Old Town and Little Amazon – An Intriguing Journey Through Time and Nature
item.description: Takua Pa Old Town and Canoeing at Little Amazon Join us on a half-day journey Takua Pa Old town and Little Amazon through nature and time! Immerse yourself in the multicultural ambiance of Takua Pa Old Town, a living testament to the rich history and diverse culture found in the region. Explore a stunning yet eerie tidal ecosystem by canoeing through a dense forest of mangrove and banyan trees, teeming with wildlife. Lest we forget more recent historical events, we stop for a moment of reflection at the Tsunami Memorial at Baan Nam Khem or the Tsunami Museum near Takua […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Takua Pa, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: Phuket Tour DIY
item.description: Would you like to organize a Phuket Tour DIY? We can help you structure and optimize your private tour to Phuket or the surrounding area of Khao Lak. With our comfortable minibus and an experienced driver, you can enjoy the day to the fullest (8 hours). Prefer to travel on your own and do a tour according to your own wishes? We can make it possible. With us you can hire a minibus (van with 9-12 seats) with your own reliable driver who will take you safely from one place to another. You should think about which destinations you would […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phuket, Thailand

item.title: Patong Nightlife – Explore the Wild Party Scene in Patong at Night
item.description: Patong at Night – Experience Patong Nightlife Khao Lak is a popular destination in Thailand for tourists looking to relax on picturesque beaches or immerse themselves in the region’s pristine nature. Many visitors to Khao Lak go to the Similan and Surin Islands or explore Khao Sok National Park, one of the oldest rainforests on the planet. However, Khao Lak is not known for its nightlife and you may want to let loose for a night but can’t find a place to party. So if you’re seeking a lively party scene while on holiday, we can take you to vibrant […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Patong, Phuket

item.title: Phuket Weekend Market – Explore Phuket’s Largest Night Market and Visit Phuket’s Big Buddha
item.description: Phuket Weekend Market – Visit Big Buddha and Explore the Naka Market When visiting Khao Lak, you may wish to shop for souvenirs, clothing, and many other goods, only to find that the selection at the local markets is very limited. Khao Lak is famed for its breathtaking natural beauty, not for shopping, but on the other hand, Phuket is a shopper’s paradise and it’s just a relatively short drive away. You may ask yourself, “Why would I need to pay for a guide to take me shopping? The simple answer is that you don’t need a guide, you need […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phuket Night Market

item.title: Phuket Shopping & Sightseeing – Visit Phuket’s Largest Temple and Shop Until You Drop!
item.description: Phuket Shopping and Sightseeing You’ve planned a trip to immerse yourself in the serene natural beauty of Khao Lak, but you still want to explore some of what Phuket has to offer? No problem. Khao Lak Land Discovery has designed a full-day trip to Phuket to experience the local culture, vibrant shopping scene, and view spectacular panoramic vistas. Shopping in Khao Lak is definitively sub-par, so if you love to peruse through a wide variety of shops in search of the items you desire, Phuket is the place to be! On this day trip to Phuket, we take you to […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phuket

item.title: Amazing 3 Temples – Full Day Temple Tour from Khao Lak
item.description: Our Amazing Three Temple Tour from Khao Lak No visit to Thailand would be complete without visiting one of the many Buddhist temples. On our Amazing 3 Temple Tour, we will take you to three temples, not just one. What could possibly so different about a Buddhist temple that you need to visit three? While all three temples are Buddhist, each temple is unique in design, location, and function. Join us on our full-day temple tour to breathtaking locations and gain a broader perspective on Thailand’s most practiced religion. Quite often, Thai Buddhist temples are constructed in the most awe-inspiring […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Wat Bang Riang Phra Buddha Itthi Mongkolchai, Bang Riang, Thap Put District, Phang-nga, Thailand

item.title: James Bond Island tour & Phang Nga Bay – Breathtakingly Beautiful Ao Phang Nga National Park!
item.description: James Bond Island tour – Phang Nga Bay A guided sea tour to picturesque Ao Phang Nga Bay National Park to behold James Bond Island tour (Ko Tapu) and visit the Panyi (Panyee) Village is a highlight for many tourists venturing to the south of Thailand. Khao Lak Land Discovery would be honoured to take you there! Phang Nga Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, is famed for its constantly evolving karst topography that water erosion has sculpted into some of the most strikingly beautiful islands to be found anywhere in the world, none being more iconic than Koh Tapu, […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Ao Phang Nga National Park, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: Khao Sok Treehouse 2 Day Discovery- Experience Stunning Khao Sok Natural
item.description: Khao Sok 2 Day Treehouse Are you searching for the perfect blend of relaxation at Khao Sok Treehouse and adventure into the heart of Khao Sok National Park and Cheow Lan Lake? You owe it to yourself to take a few minutes and look at our 2-Day Discovery tour. On this exciting overnight excursion, you get the best of both worlds! We combine a few hallmark Khao Sok activities that require little physical effort for a more relaxed way to experience the awe and wonder the park is famed for. You will not need to rough it either, for you […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Sok National Park, Surat Thani, Thailand

item.title: Khao Sok Lake Day Trip – Breathtaking Cheow Lan Lake
item.description: Khao Sok Lake Tour on Cheow Lan Lake Join us on our Khao Sok Lake Tour for a sightseeing cruise on the magical waters of Cheow Lan Lake, a strikingly-beautiful region of Khao Sok National Park which could be described best as Shangri La! Many of the world’s most awe-inspiring regions are often best viewed from aboard the deck of a boat, allowing unobstructed views of the surrounding landscapes that would otherwise not be possible from land. Khao Sok National Park is such a place and the panoramic views aboard a boat on scenic Cheow Lan Lake are nothing short […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Cheow Lan Lake, Khao Phang, Ban Ta Khun District, Surat Thani, Thailand

item.title: Khao Sok Day Trip – Wet and Wild Fun for All Ages!
item.description: Khao Sok Day Trip – A Once in a Lifetime Experience! Immerse yourself in the grandeur of Khao Sok National Park, home to some of the world’s rarest and most exotic flora and fauna, where a lush emerald rainforest blankets the harsh terrain, and towering limestone cliffs seem to touch the sky. If you’re not a fan of trekking through the jungle, don’t worry. We’ve got you covered! Khao Lak Land Discovery has designed a fun-filled, low-impact, full-day tour, perfect for all ages, filled with the park’s greatest wet and wild hits! Bathe with Asian elephants, canoe down the Sok […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Sok National Park

item.title: Khao Lak Adventure – 3 Thrilling Action Sport Activities!
item.description: Khao Lak Adventure – Whitewater Rafting, Zip-Line, ATV Quad Trail Riding! Looking for a tour to get your adrenaline pumping? We’ve got just what the doctor ordered! Our Khao Lak Adventure is a full-day tour filled with action and excitement on land, water, and even in the air! So if you’re looking for a little action and adventure amongst Phang Nga’s breathtaking scenery, grab your swimsuit and come along with Khao Lak Land Discovery! Phang Nga’s stunning landscapes and diverse wildlife understandably make the province a nature lovers paradise! The old-growth rainforest juxtaposed by towering limestone mountains are a sight […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Songpreak, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: Khao Lak Elephant Bath – Exciting Fun for All Ages!
item.description: Khao Lak Elephant Bath – An Exciting Half-Day Tour, Fun for All Ages! Join us for a unique and heartwarming chance to connect and bathe with Thailand’s beloved elephants on our half-day tour. You can make your dream of getting up close and personal with these majestic creatures a reality, while ensuring their well-being. It’s a truly remarkable experience that captivates visitors of all ages and will bring out the inner child in everyone! Elephant camps nationwide are making progress, but creating the ideal habitat for these gentle giants is a costly endeavor. Promoting responsible elephant tourism in Thailand is […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Lak, Phang-nga

item.title: Phi Phi Islands – An Unforgettable Phi Phi Islands Day Trip from Khao Lak
item.description: Phi Phi Islands Early Bird Day Trip Join us for an unforgettable day on our early-bird departure to the Phi Phi Islands. The Phi Phi archipelago is best known for picturesque beaches, towering limestone cliffs that rise from the ocean, and vibrant coral reefs, all waiting for you to explore just a short speedboat trip away! The Phi Phi Islands are also infamous for overcrowded boat trips and beaches, so to avoid the crowds as best as we can, we pick you up before dawn at your hotel in the Khao Lak area, transfer you to our private departure lounge […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Mu Ko Phi Phi National Park, Krabi, Thailand

item.title: Surin Islands Snorkeling Day Trip – Spectacular Marine Life
item.description: Surin Islands Sunrise Tour Escape the crowds and embark on an adventure to the breathtaking Surin Islands, home to the fascinating Moken people! The Mu Ko Surin National Marine Park boasts some of the most stunning snorkelling spots in all of Southeast Asia! Unlike many other tourist hotspots in Thailand, the Surin Archipelago remains an unspoiled paradise, unscathed by mass tourism. Experience the unique culture of the Moken people, then immerse yourself in tranquil waters and discover the thrill of exploring enchanting coral reefs! If you are looking for an island speedboat trip that offers the most to see underwater, […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Ko Surin Nuea, Ko Phra Thong, Khura Buri District, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: Hong Island & Phang Nga Bay – Exclusive 3 Island Tour at Phang Nga Bay!
item.description: Hong Island, Panak Island, and James Bond Island An Island Hopping Tour to the amazing Phang Nga Bay! Join us on our early bird excursion to Koh Hong Island, Panak Island and James Bond Island in the wonderful Phang Nga Bay! The picturesque limestone islands that rise from the sea have become a must-see for those venturing to the south of Thailand. Come along with Khao Lak Land Discovery and explore three of the most unique islands in the region! You will visit Ko Khao Phing Kan Island to view the iconic James Bond Island. Later, you will explore Koh […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Ao Phang Nga National Park, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: Khao Lak National Park Safari – Bamboo Rafting and Elephant activity, Fun for All Ages!
item.description: Khao Lak National Park Safari – Elephant Bath, Bamboo Rafting, Sea Turtle Conservation Center! Are you looking for a tour that combines adventure and Thai culture suitable for all ages? Look no further than the Khao Lak National Park Safari Tour! Our full-day tour is a relaxing way to explore and experience the natural beauty, native wildlife, proud culture and religion of Khao Lak National Park. Buddhist temples dot the landscape of Thailand, and no visit to the country is complete without visiting one. On this Khao Lak National Park full-day tour, we will give you an inside look into […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Lak, Phang-nga

item.title: Similan Islands Snorkeling Day Trip – 9 Islands of Unparalleled Beauty!
item.description: Similan Islands Snorkeling Day Trip from Khao Lak Join us on an unforgettable Similan Islands snorkeling day trip to this picturesque nine-island archipelago located in the North Andaman Sea! The Similan Islands are covered with lush emerald-coloured forests and white sand beaches scattered amongst giant granite boulders, all surrounded by azure waters, where a vibrant seascape awaits you beneath the surface! Get your camera ready and come along to discover a world of natural wonders, where every moment is a picture-perfect postcard waiting to be captured and shared! Ranging in size from the tiniest of gobies to the whale shark, […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Similan Islands, Phang Nga, Thailand

item.title: 2 Day Khao Sok Wildlife – A Fascinating Cheow Lan Lake Wildlife Spotting Adventure
item.description: Khao Sok Wildlife Overnight Lake Safari Are you looking for a tour offering the opportunity to see wild elephants, gibbons, guar, hornbills, and many more of the exotic species found in Khao Sok National Park? Look no further! Khao Lak Land Discovery proudly operates overnight trips to to where the action is at Cheow Lan Lake! Our overnight Khao Sok wildlife spotting tour brings you near the wildlife sanctuaries that are out of reach of day-trippers. Come with us and explore the spectacular landscape around Cheow Lan Lake in search of the exotic flora and fauna that has made Khao […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Khao Sok National Park

item.title: Khao Lak Off-Road Safari – Exclusive 4×4 Khao Lak Off-Road Adventure
item.description: Khao Lak Off-Road Safari – 4×4 Tour in Pristine Phutajor National Park Get ready for an unforgettable, awe-inspiring day filled with adventure and excitement! Join us on our hallmark Khao Lak Off-Road Safari, We’ll take you on an exhilarating off-road expedition through the rarely-visited Phutajor region, where emerald rainforests blanket towering mountains, amongst which an abundance of wildlife flourishes and big cats roam! Just south of Khao Sok National Park and far off the tourist trail, behold breathtaking panoramic views unobstructed by any signs of civilization atop our formidable off-road vehicle as it traverses the ascent to 600 metres elevation! […]
item.g:google_product_category: Travel & Events > Travel Services > Sightseeing Tours
item.g:location_address: Phutajor National Park, Phang Nga, Thailand
